name: Raspberry Meringue Bars
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 325°F. Grease a 13x9" baking pan.
Beat butter and brown sugar in a medium bowl with an electric mixer at medium speed until light and fluffy. Add the egg; beat until blended. Stir in flour until well combined. Pat dough evenly in the prepared pan.
Bake for 20 minutes. Remove from oven; spread raspberry filling over crust. Do not turn off oven.
FOR MERINGUE TOPPING: Beat egg whites in a medium bowl with an electric mixer at high speed until soft peaks form. Add granulated sugar gradually, beating until stiff and glossy. Fold coconut and almonds into the beaten egg white mixture. Spread over raspberry filling. Return to oven. Bake for 20 minutes or until meringue topping is lightly browned. Cool completely in pan on a wire rack. Cut into 48 bars.
Makes 48 bars.
